sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_indexes (index UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY index;
INSERT INTO geo_indexes SELECT index FROM h3GetRes0Indexes();
SELECT arrayJoin(h3GetRes0Indexes()) AS index FROM system.one;
UPDATE geo_indexes SET index = index * 2 WHERE index % 2 = 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_indexes WHERE index IN (SELECT arrayJoin(h3GetRes0Indexes()));
